title: Barrow of the Hollow King Pico

coordination_skills: search for counterplay before brute-force boss damage
assign guard cleanup while boss pressure is active
coordinate retreat when revive pressure exceeds tempo
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the boss counterplay and revive control signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first boss counterplay and revive control choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on boss counterplay and revive control without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A two-threat barrow: one hollow knight, one guard, one root marker, and an objective that accelerates revival pressure.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Barrow of the Hollow King variant while preserving the boss counterplay and revive control signal.
